Why Use Cases Docs

Use Cases

Real-world examples of how teams use .prompt to build better LLM applications.

🎓

Educational Prompts

Build adaptive teaching experiences that adjust to learner level and progress.

🔄

Multi-Step Workflows

Orchestrate complex multi-turn conversations with clear state management.

🔀

Conditional Generation

Generate contextually appropriate responses based on user attributes.

🧩

Fragment Composition

Build prompts from reusable, composable pieces.

Have a use case to share?

We'd love to hear how you're using .prompt. Share your story and help others learn.
